message.content:
I need to catalog every plugin from the Claude Code Workflows marketplace. 

For each plugin directory in C:\Users\User\.claude\plugins\marketplaces\claude-code-workflows\plugins\, I need:
1. The plugin name (directory name)
2. Read the plugin.json or manifest to get: description, available skills, available agents
3. List all skill .md files and agent .md files within each plugin

Start by listing all plugin directories, then for each one read the plugin.json/manifest file to get the metadata.

Give me a structured output like:
```
PLUGIN: plugin-name
  Description: ...
  Skills: skill1, skill2
  Agents: agent1, agent2
  Keywords: ...
```

Do this for ALL 72 plugins. Be thorough - read every plugin.json.

Use offset and limit parameters to read specific portions of the file, the Grep tool to search for specific content, and jq to make structured queries.
REQUIREMENTS FOR SUMMARIZATION/ANALYSIS/REVIEW:
- You MUST read the content from the file at C:\Users\User\.claude\projects\C--Users-User\e38866fd-1c76-44da-b944-065b29e39956\tool-results\mcp-filesystem-directory_tree-1771971140320.txt in sequential chunks until 100% of the content has been read.

content.text: Let me take a more efficient approach. I'll use a script to find all plugin.json files and read them:
Perfect! Now let me read all these plugin.json files. I'll do this efficiently by reading multiple files in parallel:
Good! Let me continue with the next batch:
Let me continue with the next batch:
Let me continue with the next batch:
Let me continue with the next batch:
Let me continue with the next batch:
Let me continue with the final batch:
Let me get the last two plugins:
Perfect! Now let me extract the skills and agents from each plugin. Let me check the structure of a few plugins to understand how skills and agents are organized:
Good! Now I understand the structure. Let me create a comprehensive script to extract all skills and agents from all plugins:

input.command:
for plugin_dir in C:\Users\User\.claude\plugins\marketplaces\claude-code-workflows\plugins\*/; do
  plugin_name=$(basename "$plugin_dir")
  skills=$(find "$plugin_dir/skills" -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | tail -n +2 | xargs -I {} basename {} | tr '\n' ',' | sed 's/,$//')
  agents=$(find "$plugin_dir/agents" -maxdepth 1 -type f -name "*.md" 2>/dev/null | xargs -I {} basename {} .md | tr '\n' ',' | sed 's/,$//')
  commands=$(find "$plugin_dir/commands" -maxdepth 1 -type f -name "*.md" 2>/dev/null | xargs -I {} basename {} .md | tr '\n' ',' | sed 's/,$//')
  
  echo "PLUGIN: $plugin_name"
  [ -n "$skills" ] && echo "  Skills: $skills" || echo "  Skills: (none)"
  [ -n "$agents" ] && echo "  Agents: $agents" || echo "  Agents: (none)"
  [ -n "$commands" ] && echo "  Commands: $commands" || echo "  Commands: (none)"
  echo
done
